def negative_generic_class_used_without_type_parameter_application():
    rule_id = "generic_class_used_without_type_parameter_application"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Generic class subclassed or instantiated without supplying the required type parameters."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
